agree with.translate: 1) Соглашаться с кем-либо или чем-либо, разделять мнение 2) Подходить (о еде, климате), хорошо влиять на здоровье
examples: Do you agree with me on this?
Fresh air agrees with everyone.
I completely agree with your opinion.
Milk doesn't agree with some people.
We all agreed with the proposal.
That meal didn't agree with my stomach.
The climate here agrees with her.
He doesn't agree with the new rules.
She agreed with the decision to cancel the event.
Spicy food doesn't agree with me.
I agree with you.
Yeah, I agree with you.
I agree with your plan.
I can't agree with you!
I agree with you there.
Wine doesn't agree with me.
In the main they agree with us.
I agree with you up to a point.
I do agree with him to an extent.
His calculations agree with ours.
White wine doesn't agree with me.
I agree with you a hundred percent.
This climate doesn't agree with her.
That's true. I agree with you there.
Lee could not help but agree with her.
I didn't agree with everything he said.
He tends to agree with me ideologically.
He did not agree with indulging children.
Mark was only too happy to agree with her.
I do agree with his ideas to a certain extent.
Hands up if you agree with what Eric was saying.
I don't agree with his assessment of the problem.
He could not agree with him respecting the price.
These two statements don't agree with each other.
I agree with you, but only on a theoretical level.
If she felt he was right, she would agree with him.
I pretended to agree with her, just to keep her happy.
She doesn't agree with their gloomy economic forecasts.
I agree with John's point about keeping the costs down.
I respect his views, although I do not agree with them.
example_translate: Ты согласен со мной в этом?
Свежий воздух полезен всем.
Я полностью согласен с твоим мнением.
Молоко не подходит некоторым людям.
Мы все согласились с предложением.
Эта еда не подошла моему желудку.
Климат здесь ей подходит.
Он не согласен с новыми правилами.
Она согласилась с решением отменить мероприятие.
Острая еда мне не подходит.

agree with.synonyms:
Соглашаться с кем-либо или чем-либо, разделять мнение - concur, be in agreement, share the view, say yes to
Подходить (о еде, климате), хорошо влиять на здоровье - suit, be good for, benefit, do good
